holdings.infoBox: APIE is an equity ETF with a total of 551 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 11.94%, Tencent Holdings at 2.60%, ASML Holding at 2.02%, Alibaba Group Holding at 1.65%, and Roche Holding AG at 1.13%.

overview.description: The ActivePassive International Equity ETF (APIE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that utilizes a core and explore investment strategy in pursuing international equity exposure. The strategy blends passive and active approach to optimize cost, tracking and potential return over its benchmark index. APIE was launched on May 3, 2023 and is issued by Envestnet.
